situation: SZ-PP-H-001 (high): ImageUploader.processFile has no file size limit. Large files (>100MB) are fully read into memory via FileReader.readAsDataURL and base64-encoded (~33% expansion), causing extension OOM crash.
action: Add 10MB MAX_FILE_SIZE constant and early-return guard in processFile before FileReader instantiation. User-facing alert shows actual file size in MB.
outcome_evidence: Commit f9d5f1c pushed to origin/auto/opt-popup-1783215325. File size check added at line 17 before FileReader. No other logic changed.
next_suggestion: SZ-SP-H-001 (high): containerRef dual assignment in sidepanel — next high-priority pending fix
After all H-severity fixes dispatched, proceed to M-severity batch

audit_findings.finding: No file size limit on image upload — memory bomb via large file base64 encoding
